POC catalog and every frozen item were coordinator-reconciled.

POC closeout uses a verified target-specific catalog transformation; shared-parser review is deferred.

sources.title: Official Food & Drink index
sources.excerpt: The official Food & Drink index links the restaurant's Dinner Menu, Brunch Menu, Dessert Menu, and Bar & Happy Hour Menu surfaces.
sources.artifactSuggested: Capture page HTML showing the four child-menu links.

sources.title: Barrel & Crow official homepage
sources.excerpt: Official Barrel & Crow site identifies the restaurant at 4867 Cordell Ave., Bethesda, MD 20814 and links its food-and-drink pages.
sources.artifactSuggested: Capture homepage identity and address block.

sources.title: Dated Dinner Menu 2025 PDF
sources.excerpt: Dated official PDF titled Dinner Menu 2025; retained as supporting historical evidence and superseded by the live dinner page/image.
sources.artifactSuggested: Archive the dated PDF separately from current surfaces.

sources.title: Targeted Barrel & Crow allergen search
sources.excerpt: Targeted domain and restaurant-name searches surfaced official menu pages and images but no complete allergen, nutrition, or ingredient matrix.
sources.artifactSuggested: Retain query terms and result URLs for reproducibility.

sources.title: Restaurant-linked Toast dinner catalog
sources.excerpt: Barrel and Crow, 4867 Cordell Ave, Bethesda, MD 20814. The linked DINNER catalog enumerates 48 distinct food products after featured-item duplicates and merchandise are excluded.
sources.artifactSuggested: Capture the complete Toast dinner catalog with location and item descriptions.

sources.title: Live Dinner Menu page
sources.excerpt: Official page heading 'Dinner Menu' at 4867 Cordell Ave., Bethesda, MD 20814; it embeds the current dinner drawing E6 and shows 2026 Barrel and Crow copyright.
sources.artifactSuggested: Capture page heading, location, footer, and embedded E6 URL.

sources.title: Live Dinner Menu image
sources.excerpt: Dinner image enumerates 31 consolidated food products, including Steamed Mussels (white wine, butter, garlic, ginger, shallots, red Fresno pepper, grilled bread), Raspberry Point Oysters, Pan Seared Rainbow Trout, Spiced Shrimp & Grits, and sides.
sources.artifactSuggested: Archive the 816x1344 PNG and OCR/text transcription.

sources.title: Live Sunday Brunch Menu page
sources.excerpt: Official page heading 'Brunch Menu' at 4867 Cordell Ave., Bethesda, MD 20814; hours state Brunch Sun 11:00a–2:30p and the page embeds E8.
sources.artifactSuggested: Capture page heading, brunch hours, location, and embedded E8 URL.

sources.title: Live Sunday Brunch Menu image
sources.excerpt: Brunch image enumerates 32 consolidated nonalcoholic food products, including Breakfast Burrito with scrambled egg and chipotle crema, Southern Shakshouka with creme fraiche and fried eggs, Brioche French Toast with candied walnuts and whipped cream, and 2 Eggs Any Style.
sources.artifactSuggested: Archive the 1224x2016 PNG and OCR/text transcription.

sources.title: Live Dessert Menu page
sources.excerpt: Official page heading 'Dessert Menu' at 4867 Cordell Ave., Bethesda, MD 20814; it embeds the current dessert drawing E10.
sources.artifactSuggested: Capture page heading, location, footer, and embedded E10 URL.

sources.title: Live Dessert Menu image
sources.excerpt: Dessert image lists Flourless Chocolate Torte with espresso ice cream, Vanilla Creme Brulee with almond biscotti, Sweet Beignets with whipped cream, Housemade Ice Cream & Sorbet, Strawberry-Rhubarb Crisp with vanilla ice cream, Rustic Peach Tart with blueberry ice cream, and Harney & Sons Teas.
sources.artifactSuggested: Archive the 816x1056 PNG and OCR/text transcription.

sources.title: Live Bar & Happy Hour Menu page
sources.excerpt: Official page heading 'Bar & Happy Hour Menu' at 4867 Cordell Ave., Bethesda, MD 20814; it embeds the current bar/happy-hour drawing E12.
sources.artifactSuggested: Capture page heading, happy-hour hours, location, and embedded E12 URL.

sources.title: Live Bar & Happy Hour Menu image
sources.excerpt: Bar & Happy Hour image enumerates 20 distinct food products after duplicate presentations and alcohol sections are excluded, including Smoked Beef Brisket Slider (2), Blackened Salmon Slider (2), Mini Pork Tacos (3), and Fried Pickles.
sources.artifactSuggested: Archive the 1056x816 PNG and OCR/text transcription; exclude wine, beer, and liquor sections.

sourceAttempts.notes: Inspected the official index and current child pages S3-S6; no complete allergen matrix or cross-contact disclosure was present.
Inspected official PDF/document and live Google Drawing image surfaces E6/E8/E10/E12; menu descriptions provide partial positives only, not a complete matrix.
Inspected the restaurant-linked Toast catalog and item descriptions; no complete allergen matrix or restaurant-wide item-level mayContain binding was found.
Targeted searches for allergen, allergy, nutrition, ingredients, PDF, and menu surfaced no complete current allergen matrix.

repairs.summary: Applied and validated the restaurant-specific POC catalog repair.
verificationCommands: sha256 comparison of all owned artifacts

adjudication.rationale: Research structure, current product mappings, direct allergen authority, target repair, Ingredient Intelligence timing, focused validation, and idempotency passed the POC terminal gates.

notes: POC worker artifacts persisted by the root coordinator.
Coordinator-only POC closeout packet generated after serialized APPLY.
